narrative_beat: Texto grego dourado com bestas de sete cabecas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid ancient parchment scroll of Revelation with golden calligraphy text and ornate borders depicting seven-headed crimson beasts, held reverently by ancient prophetic fingers in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the golden calligraphy text and seven-headed crimson beast borders
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated university library with towering bookshelves in background

mood.emotion: reverent reading of the prophecy now fulfilled

symbolism.primary: Revelation 13:15 as the most relevant verse of the twenty-first century
symbolism.secondary: beast borders as visual proof surrounding the text

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
